name: QueryExecutionEngine

neutralConcepts: executionOrder: T187-quota=1, F422-RLS=2, F423-PII=3, executeQuery=4, recordUsage=5
T187 is INLINE — instantiated in constructor, NOT @Inject(). F426 does NOT exist.
F422 IRowLevelSecurityService is PLATFORM-ONLY — cannot be disabled
F423 IPIIMaskingService runs BEFORE result serialization — no opt-out
On quota_exceeded: emit QueryFailed(reason=quota_exceeded), return immediately
On rls_denied: emit QueryFailed(reason=rls_denied), return immediately
On masking_error: emit QueryFailed(reason=masking_error), return immediately

ironRules.rule: GATE ORDER IS MANDATORY: T187 quota (INLINE, layer 1) → F422 RLS (layer 2) → F423 PII masking (layer 3). Any reordering is a BUILD_FAILURE.
T187 QuotaManager is INLINE — instantiated in T173 constructor. F426 does NOT exist. Never @Inject(T187) or reference F426.
F422 IRowLevelSecurityService is PLATFORM-ONLY — tenant cannot disable. canBeDisabled: false.
F423 IPIIMaskingService must run BEFORE result serialization. No skipMasking flags accepted.
IWarehouseAuditService (F425) MUST record every query operation.

keywords: query execution engine three layer security gate inline quota manager RLS PII masking PLATFORM-ONLY warehouse audit
